title: YTP: Ice Cream Bloody Murder
description:
In this video, Brilbert discovers that Ben and Jerry's can be shortened to BJ and he can't stop giggling.

I love ice cream. The original video is Brian David Gilbert's weird ice creams https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tjmzfOUOw08&t=754s. It is so good and makes me want to ice cream some ice cream.

If you loved this, subscribe for more! And you can support me on Patreon here: https://www.patreon.com/Captpan6

Also follow me on my socials for other cool stuff!
